<parameter=code>

ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')

# Find white pixel (likely player)
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'W':
        print("White node: id=%d boundary=%s pixels=%d" % (n['id'], n['boundary'], n['pixels'])
    if n['color'] == 'Y':
        print("Yellow node: id=%d boundary=%s pixels=%d" % (n['id'], n['boundary'], n['pixels'])
    if n['color'] == 'b':
        print("Blue node: id=%d boundary=%s pixels=%d" % (n['id'], n['boundary'], n['pixels'])
# Print a crop around the white dot area
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i, line in enumerate(ascii_lines):
    if 'W' in line:
        print("Row %d: %s" % (i, line)
